title: The Cartographer's Last Latitude
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A disgraced 18th-century cartographer, hired to chart an uncharted Arctic passage, discovers his maps are being used not for science but to strand a rival colonial fleet in permanent ice.
long_description: A disgraced 18th-century cartographer, hired to chart an uncharted Arctic passage, discovers his maps are being used not for science but to strand a rival colonial fleet in permanent ice.
